db package¶

Submodules¶

db.db_manager module¶

class db.db_manager.DatabaseManager(db_path='personal_planner.db')[source]¶

Bases: object

Handles all database operations for the application.

Responsibilities: - Database initialization - CRUD operations for tasks, vacations and itineraries

add_activity(vacation_id, day, start_time, end_time, activity, location=None, notest=None)[source]¶

Adds a new activity to a vacation itinerary.

add_task(title, deadline=None)[source]¶

Adds a new task to the database.

Parameters:

  • title – Task title

  • deadline – Task date (YYYY-MM-DD)

add_vacation(destination, start_date, end_date)[source]¶

Adds a new vacation to the database.

delete_activity(activity_id)[source]¶

Deletes an activity from the database.

Parameters:

activity_id – ID of the activity

Returns:

True if deletion was successful

get_activities(vacation_id, day)[source]¶

Retrieves activities for a specific vacation day.

Returns:

List of Itinerary objects

get_tasks_by_date(date)[source]¶

Retrieves tasks for a specific date.

Parameters:

date – Date string (YYYY-MM-DD)

Returns:

List of Task objects

get_vacations()[source]¶

Retrieves all vacations.

Returns:

List of Vacation objects

initialize_database()[source]¶

Creates database tables if they do not already exist.

mark_task_done(task_id)[source]¶

Marks a task as completed.

Parameters:

task_id – ID of the task

Personal Planer
